title: Veeva (VEEV) Falls Nearly 3% on Morgan Stanley Downgrade
text: Veeva's (VEEV) shares lose nearly 3% after Morgan Stanley downgrades the stock to underweight, citing potential revenue loss from Salesforce's entry into the Life Sciences customer relationship management market.

title: Why Veeva Systems Stock Slumped by Nearly 3% Today
text: A top investment bank downgraded its recommendation on the shares. Its analyst cited a potentially tough competitive threat as a key reason for the move.

title: 2 No-Brainer Healthcare Stocks to Buy Right Now
text: AbbVie's shares are dropping due to an anticipated obstacle, but the company's prospects remain bright. Veeva Systems' deep moat and excellent growth prospects make it a solid stock to buy today.

title: Veeva Systems: AI Potential For Life Sciences Underappreciated
text: Veeva Systems focuses on providing cloud software and applications for the life sciences industry, including pharmaceuticals and biotech companies, making it unique in the market. Key growth drivers for Veeva include data analytics and AI, as well as drug safety systems, which are essential for pharmaceutical companies. Despite recent stock price underperformance, Veeva has strong financials, with a 40% adjusted operating margin and a $3 billion cash balance, making it an attractive investment opportunity.

title: 2 Growth Stocks Ready for a Bull Run
text: Veeva has carved out a valuable niche in providing cloud services to biotech companies. Adyen helps companies handle customer payments across borders around the world.

title: Veeva Business Consulting Expands with New R&D Services
text: Customers gain industry expertise, data, and best practices to streamline product development PLEASANTON, Calif. , June 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --  2023 Veeva R&D and Quality Summit, Europe — Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) today announced the expansion of its business consulting services to help life sciences organizations achieve greater speed and efficiency across the product development lifecycle.

title: Veeva to Present at Upcoming Investor Conferences
text: PLEASANTON, Calif. , June 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) today announced participation in the following investor conferences: William Blair 43rd Annual Growth Stock Conference, Chicago, IL.

title: More Than 450 Companies Adopt Veeva Vault eTMF for Improved Trial Efficiency and Inspection Readiness
text: Companies modernizing TMF management to drive automation and speed PLEASANTON, Calif. , June 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- As the industry advances clinical operations, adopting applications on a unified platform is a top priority to increase study efficiency and compliance.

title: 2 Soaring Healthcare Stocks That Could Climb Even Higher
text: Shares of Veeva Systems and Doximity surged during the week ended June 2 and they're probably not finished climbing. Veeva Systems is a software-as-a-service company that caters to the biopharmaceutical industry.

title: Where Will Veeva Systems Stock Be in 1 Year?
text: Veeva's Q1 earnings easily beat Wall Street's expectations. It raised its full-year revenue and earnings guidance.

title: Is Veeva Systems a Buy Now?
text: Veeva Systems reported fiscal first-quarter results Wednesday that beat expectations, but weren't too exciting. The stock soared in response to management's outlook, which implies stronger growth in the second half of the year than analysts had expected.

title: Veeva Systems (VEEV) Beats on Q1 Earnings, Ups FY24 Outlook
text: Veeva Systems' (VEEV) fiscal Q1 results reflect impressive performances by both segments.

title: Why Veeva Systems Stock Is Soaring Today
text: Veeva Systems' first-quarter sales and earnings results topped the average Wall Street targets. The software company's guidance for the rest of the year also beat expectations.
